zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia於1221年出生在法國巴希-阿爾培斯福爾卡爾時，她的父親Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV26歲，母親Béatrice de Savoie23歲。她於1234年5月27日與St. Louis IX roi de France結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1295年12月20日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年74歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia于1221年出生在法国巴希-阿爾培斯福爾卡爾时，她的父亲Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV26岁，母亲Béatrice de Savoie23岁。她于1234年5月27日与St. Louis IX roi de France结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1295年12月20日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年74岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Provenza
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Pietro, Angelo, Aniello, Concetta, Enzo, Salvatore.
Italian: habitational name from Provence in southern France, the Italian name of which is Provenza.

variants.name: Provenzano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Rocco, Ciro, Gaetano, Santo, Aldo, Antonietta, Antonio, Calogero, Carmela, Carmelo.
Italian: habitational name for someone from Provence in France, from an adjectival derivative of   Provenza  .

nameMeanings.name: Margarita
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Margaret  , now widely adopted in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia was born in 1221, in Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, France, her father, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, was 26 and her mother, Béatrice de Savoie, was 23. She married St. Louis IX roi de France on 27 May 1234. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 December 1295, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 74, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia est née en 1221, à Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, France, son père, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Savoie, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé St. Louis IX roi de France le 27 mai 1234. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 décembre 1295, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia 1221 in Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV 26 und ihre Mutter Béatrice de Savoie 23. Sie hat am 27. Mai 1234 St. Louis IX roi de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Dezember 1295 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia è nata il nel 1221 nel Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Béatrice de Savoie, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato St. Louis IX roi de France il 27 maggio 1234. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 dicembre 1295, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Franciaが1221年にフランスバセス-アルペスフォーカルクイエルで生まれた時，父Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IVは26歳，母Béatrice de Savoieは23歳であった。1234年5月27日にSt. Louis IX roi de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1295年12月20日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで74歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia(이)가 1221년 프랑스 배세스-알프스 포캘키어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Béatrice de Savoie(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1234년 5월 27일 St. Louis IX roi de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 12월 20일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia nasceu em 1221, em Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, França, seu pai, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Savoie, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com St. Louis IX roi de France em 27 de maio de 1234. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1295, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia родилась в 1221 г. в местности форкалкуиир, бассес-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Savoie, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени St. Louis IX roi de France 27 мая 1234 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 декабря 1295 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-денис, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margarita de Provenza Reina Consorte de Francia nació en 1221, en Forcalquier, Basses-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Count Raimond Berenger de Provence IV, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Savoie, tenía 23 años. Se casó con St. Louis IX roi de France el 27 de mayo de 1234. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1295, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
